core.styling: Vanilla CSS Custom Properties & CSS Grid/Flexbox

3d_graphics.assets: Procedurally generated dust textures (HTML5 Canvas 2D context)

performance_guards: Zero-dependency loading for instantaneous Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
Decoupled particle physics loops avoiding rendering waterfalls
Static hosting compatibility (GitHub Pages, Vercel) for rapid deployment

hardware_integration_protocol.target_mcu: ESP32-C3 or similar microcontroller via USB-UART bridge
hardware_integration_protocol.software_receiver_flow: 1. User clicks 'Connect Hardware' -> 2. Browser requests serial port access -> 3. Continuous reader parses serial stream -> 4. Stream parser updates global parameters in main.js -> 5. 3D simulation adapts in real-time
